problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Small. Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
